case_title: BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. VS CHEW CITY AUTO SUPPLY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIDGEPORT FINANCIAL, INC. SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED; NEW ATTORNEY IS LORNA WALKER
